Experience the Sandhurst Difference with Our Quality Roof Repairs & Restorations

Sandhurst Roofing has over 35 years’ experience in the roofing industry and is one of Melbourne’s leading roof specialists. We pride ourselves on providing exceptional workmanship and quality and friendly service to our clients no matter the task at hand.

We understand that your roofing needs may be urgent, that’s why we discuss your roofing requirements every step of the way while delivering a quick turnaround at a competitive price. Whether you’re looking for gutter repairs or installations, roof repairs, roof restorations or even a COLORBOND® steel roofing treatment, our team of qualified locals are on hand to help. Just give us a call today to discuss your needs and receive a competitive quote!

[/saswp_divi_faqblock]

Contact Our Roofing Team Today

Our expert team of registered roof tilers and roof plumbers service the south and eastern suburbs of Melbourne and the Mornington Peninsula including Carrum Downs, Frankston, Langwarrin, Mount Eliza and Seaford.

Are you ready to experience the Sandhurst Roofing difference for yourself? Call Steve on 0448 812 800 to have a chat about your roofing needs. Alternatively you can fill out the form below and we will be in touch with you shortly.

Book an onsite consultation

Get in touch with Melbourne's roofing experts today!
